programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 606
programme.desc: Hypokondrieren Malcolm Rayner sliter med pusten og Martin spør ham om han noen gang har jobbet med asbest.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 607
programme.desc: Al får besøk av to militære politimenn som prøver å spore opp barnevakten James, Mike Pruddy.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 608
programme.desc: Louisa drar til Spania, Bert og Jennifer forlovelsesfest ender med et smell, og Al blir hyllet som en helt for å ha reddet Carolines liv.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 701
programme.desc: Martin vender tilbake til Portwenn, men uten Louisa som har dratt for å bo hos moren sin i Spania.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 702
programme.desc: Louisas retur reiser ytterligere spørsmål om forholdet deres, og kanskje de trenger å tilbringe mer tid fra hverandre.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 703
programme.desc: Etter en ny katastrofe på restauranten hans tar Bert drastiske grep og forsvinner, noe som fører til at Al kontakter P.C. Penhale, selv om han er mer interessert i å flørte med Louisas barnevakt Janice.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa og Martin har sin første terapiøkt sammen, og ingen av dem var forberedt på å få hjemmelekser.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 705
programme.desc: Louisa og Morwenna overtaler Martin til å finne et nytt hjem til Buddy. Martin er ikke spesielt imponert over Angelas alternative tilnærming til medisin.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 706
programme.desc: Louisa hjelper ekskjæresten Danny når han tar med seg syv barn fra London for å bo på Ruths gård - overvåket av Al og Bert - mens hun og Martin planlegger en date etter råd fra dr. Timoney.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 707
programme.desc: Louisa er ikke veldig fornøyd når hennes nye kunstlærer Erica vil teste noen ganske alternative ideer på barna, mens dr. Timoney blir involvert i en bilulykke utenfor skolen.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa og Martin bestemmer seg for å prøve seg på et forhold, og starter med en forsonende middag, men Louisa er bekymret når Martin ikke klarer å dukke opp.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 801
programme.desc: Forberedelsene til Janice og Penhales bryllup fortsetter, noe som gjør Portwenn gal og Louisa og Martin har flyttet sammen igjen.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 802
programme.desc: Martin og Louisa leter etter en barnehage for James og fru Tishell er sjokkert over å oppdage at Al har høyt blodtrykk. Louisa utforsker mulighetene for en ny karriere.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 803
programme.desc: Da Louisa er ute og seiler, må Martin passe på James. Al og Morwenna arrangerer et event for å redde puben.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 804
programme.desc: Louisas første Skype-samtale for hennes nye kurs går ikke som planlagt når Martin bestemmer seg for å fortelle læreren sine tanker om kurset.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 805
programme.desc: Med James i bitestadiet er Martin og Louisa desperate etter mer søvn. Fru Tishell stenger apoteket.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 806
programme.desc: Penhale bestemmer seg for at politiet skal ha åpent hus for å øke samfunnsbevisstheten, men oppmøtet er ikke det han håpet på.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 807
programme.desc: Al og Morwenna deltar i det årlige konsert-kappløpet mot en annen by. Louisa kjøper en ny bil, og Martins blodfobi forårsaker en katastrofe med en pasient.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 808
programme.desc: Martin stenger praktikken en uken før høringen, men pasientene fortsetter å be om rådene hans. En amerikansk turist ber fru Tishell om hjelp, og Penhale bestiller en byste av seg selv.

programme.title: Bellator MMA: Bellator 178: Straus vs Pitbull 4
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes place from Mohegan Sun in Connecticut featuring a featherweight world title fight between Patricio Pitbull and Daniel Straus in the fourth chapter of their storied rivalry. Also, AJ McKee and Ilima-Lei Macfarlane return to action.

programme.title: Bellator MMA: Bellator 226: Bader vs Kongo
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to San Jose with a stacked card as the Featherweight Grand Prix kicks off with four of the opening round bouts. Then in the Main Event Ryan Bader defends his Heavyweight belt agaisnt MMA legend Chieck Kongo

programme.title: Bellator 173: McGeary vs McDermott
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Belfast, Ireland with former Light Heavyweight Champ Liam McGeary facing off against Brett McDermott. Plus rising Irish star James Gallagher!

programme.title: Bellator MMA: Bellator 95: Curran vs Shamhalaev
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Atlantic City, NJ with the Featherweight Championship belt on the line! Champion Pat Curran defends his title against Season 8 Featherweight tournament winner Shahbulat Shamhalaev.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 234
programme.desc: Finaleuken sparkes i gang med en dramatisk seremoni hvor tre par skal bli to…

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 235
programme.desc: Siste fest med gjengen! Mye sinne og frustrasjon bobler opp til overflaten, og et nytt Paradise-par viser endelig sine følelser for hverandre.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 236
programme.desc: Finale – og det er klart for den ultimate troskapstesten!

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 201
programme.desc: Åtte forventningsfulle deltagere sjekker inn i Paradis, men det er fortsatt plass til flere …

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 202
programme.desc: Det er andre dag i paradis og noen vennskap begynner allerede å slå sprekker. Hva gjør det med gruppen når en ny gjest sjekker inn?

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 203
programme.desc: Det er én for mye i paradis og tid for sesongens første partnerseremoni!

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 204
programme.desc: Det handler om å gi og ta når en ny gjest sjekker inn.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 205
programme.desc: Konfliktnivået når nye høyder etter dagens avstemning. Hvem ender til slutt opp med en trygg sitteplass?

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 206
programme.desc: Nervene er i høyspenn inn i kveldens emosjonelle partnerseremoni.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 207
programme.desc: Nytt tema - og nye gjester skal finne sin plass i paradis.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 208
programme.desc: Det er trangt i paradis og det er duket for en dramatisk pandoras eske.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 209
programme.desc: Et vanskelig valg må tas når to gode venner står i fare i kveldens partnerseremoni.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 210
programme.desc: En forbannelse har lagt seg over Paradise…

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 211
programme.desc: Loopen fortsetter – hva er det egentlig som betyr noe?

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 212
programme.desc: Forbannelsen er hevet og det jobbes for å sikre seg en trygg plass videre i spillet.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 213
programme.desc: To gjester sjekker inn!

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 214
programme.desc: To av deltagerne drar på en utflukt for å dele ut en sitteplass, og det blir høy temperatur...

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 215
programme.desc: Uken går mot slutten – og to deltagere må sjekke ut før dagen er omme.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 216
programme.desc: Deltagerne deles i to lag som skal kjempe om stor makt.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 217
programme.desc: Kampen om sitteplassene fortsetter – og lagene kniver om å få John på sin side.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 218
programme.desc: Kveldens seremoni avslører høyt spill – hvem har lurt hvem?

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 219
programme.desc: En skummel klovn går løs på resorten…

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 220
programme.desc: Det blir vinn eller forsvinn under kuppelen når det skal avsløres hvem som gjemmer seg bak klovnemasken.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Alle drar til Kyle
programme.desc: Billy og Samantha drar på bryllupsreise til Hawaii, mens Connie får en vikarjobb ved Amanda Woodward Advertising og bestemmer seg for å bli i Los Angeles.

programme.title: Melrose Place: En lyd i mørket
programme.desc: Etter å ha reddet Lexie, vender Peter tilbake til ulykkesstedet og finner en landstryker som Lexi kjørte på da hun kjørte Peters bil.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Et tre snakker i Melrose
programme.desc: Cooper avbryter Michaels jakt på Megan. Jennifer får også Cooper til å droppe søksmålet mot Michael.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Å drepe et helikopter
programme.desc: Etter å ha gjemt jazzklubbens julemidler, tar Taylor Kyle med på en helgetur til Las Vegas for å gamble og gjør et stort innhugg i gjelden.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Amanda er tilbake
programme.desc: Billy og Kyle presser et redningsteam til å sette i gang en leteaksjon etter Samantha og Amanda, som kan ha fått en alvorlig skade.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Ørkenens Kyle
programme.desc: Cooper og Megan går på date, og Michael prøver å gjøre det samme med stripperen Amber. Bob spiller sin hånd med Peter for å være med Lexi.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Nådestøtet
programme.desc: Lexis far viser sin forakt for Peter. Og Craig truer Jennifer etter at hun får vite om noen ikke-helt-lovlige kostnadskutt.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Mama Mia
programme.desc: Michael og Jennifers mor kommer på besøk og skremmer dem når Jennifer forteller moren at hun var forlovet med Craig.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Siste tog til Bagdad
programme.desc: Kyle og Amanda reiser til Santa Fe for å besøke ekskjæreten hans. Men komplikasjoner truer bryllupsdagen deres når Christine kommer til Los Angeles.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Et slag og en frue
programme.desc: Lexi flytter inn hos Cooper i Melrose og fortsetter å klandre Peter for farens død, på tross for at bevisene sier noe annet.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Stumpt drama
programme.desc: Peter blir innblandet i planen om å ødelegge forholdet til Amanda og Kyle når Christine spiller suicidal og tvinger ham til å få henne innlagt.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Christine på sporet
programme.desc: Etter at Nick og Taylor dreper Christine ved et uhell, legger de liket på togsporet og får det til å se ut som selvmord.

programme.title: Melrose Place: For romantisk for ord
programme.desc: Samantha og Billy har dårlig samvittighet angående flørtene med Jeff og Jennifer. Men lidenskap vipper dem av pinnen igjen når Jeff presser Samantha til å forlate Billy.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Fire forhold og et svangerskap
programme.desc: Michael vurderer drastiske midler angående klinikken. Men innblanding fra en sympatisk Megan får ham til å ombestemme seg.

programme.title: Melrose Place: MP fortrolighet
programme.desc: Etter å få vite at Samantha og Billys forsoning, prøver Jennifer å tenne en glød mellom Jeff og Samantha.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Den sleske professoren
programme.desc: Cooper og Megan reiser til Philadelphia slik at Cooper kan søke på en ny jobb, men dr. Larner presser Megan til seksuelle tjenester.

programme.title: Melrose Place: En dominikansk skilsmisse
programme.desc: Amanda blir med Rory til Den dominikanske republikk for å gifte seg med ham. Hun kjenner ikke til hans plan om å drepe henne og ta pengene hennes.

programme.title: Melrose Place: En lang reise
programme.desc: Peter forteller Lexi at han fortsatt har følelser for Amanda. Lexi får vite at hun kan få skylden for sin avdøde fars tyverianklager.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Kamprop
programme.desc: Etter at en ung jente dør og andre barn blir alvorlig syke, drar Walker til cherokee-reservatet for å etterforske en fabrikk som dumper giftige kjemikalier i reservatets vannforsyning.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Vestens kodeks
programme.desc: Etter at en farlig innsatt rømmer fra fengselet han soner livstid i og begynner å drepe de involverte i saken, drar Walker og Trivette ut for å avslutte hans terrorvelde før han dreper Arthur McSpadden, dommeren i saken.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Halloween-barna
programme.desc: Det blir en skremmende Halloween for noen barn i Dallas som kidnappes og holdes som gisler av "Lucifer" og en gruppe djeveldyrkere.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Overlevelse
programme.desc: Da Alex blir kidnappet og holdt som gissel i Utah-fjellene under en camping-tur, må Walker finne sin elskede forlovede og redde henne før det er for sent.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: En ny sjanse
programme.desc: Som hevn for at en av deres egne har blitt skutt, følger IRA-terrorister Adam McGuire til Dallas, der de kidnapper hans syke datter i bytte mot at han snur den irske fredsavtalen han sto bak.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Paradis-stien
programme.desc: På Walkers bursdagsselskap gir CD ham en dagbok fra Hayes Coopers tidlige dager og leser historien om hvordan Cooper hindret tre desperadoer i å angripe mormonske nybyggere i Utah-fjellene på 1800-tallet.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: En rangers øyne
programme.desc: Walker møter en søt og talentfull 16-åring som omgås feil fyr, og hjelper henne med å utvikle tilliten og motet hun trenger for å oppnå sin drøm om å bli sanger.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: På grensen
programme.desc: Walker må hjelpe innbyggerne i en liten grenseby som kontrolleres med vold og press fra sheriffen.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: De fortapte guttene
programme.desc: Etter at en politimann i Dallas blir skutt og drept, gir drapsmannen Carlos uskyldige nevø Jesse skylden. Walter må renvaske gutten for å redde livet hans.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Spesialvitne
programme.desc: Walker må finne leiemorderen som knivstakk Trent før morderen finner den utviklingshemmede jenta som var vitne til angrepet.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Rektoren
programme.desc: Etter at en av Walkers gamle venner angivelig begår selvmord, forsøker Walker å finne sannheten om dødsfallet og få orden på et campus fullt av narkolangere.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Team Cherokee, del 1
programme.desc: Walker må finne ut av hvem som prøver å sabotere et urfolk-racerbillag idet det forbereder seg på et viktig løp.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Team Cherokee, del 2
programme.desc: Da sjåføren til Team Cherokee blir satt ut av spill, må Walker ta rattet for å holde laget fra å bli diskvalifisert.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Livegirls.com
programme.desc: Det blir et kappløp mot tiden da Trivettes nye kjæreste bortføres av menneskesmuglere.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Ingen utvei
programme.desc: Da Alex og Trivette blir bortført av Walkers erkefiende og plassert i en tank med iskaldt vann, må Walker redde dem før de drukner.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Våpenbrødre
programme.desc: Da Walker og Trivette forsøker å stoppe en våpenhandel, oppdager de at Trivettes forsvunne bror står bak handelen.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Gåter
programme.desc: Mens Walker og Trivette er på sporet av en innsatt på rømmen, etterforsker CD det mystiske dødsfallet til sin venns sønn.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Maktens engler
programme.desc: Walker og Trivette tar en lånehai som utnytter en prests sønn.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Jakobs stige
programme.desc: Walker, Trivette og Alex må beskytte et nabolag mot en gjeng som bruker brann for å skremme vitner og dreper brannmenn.

programme.title: The Ice Road
programme.desc: Etter at en fjerntliggende diamantgruve kollapser i Nord-Canada tar Mike oppdraget med å lede redningsoperasjonen, og må trosse de brutale naturkreftene i Canadas villmark.

programme.title: Taken 3
programme.desc: Eks-agenten Bryan Mills er forsont med sin tidligere kone, men lykken blir kortvarig når hun brutalt myrdes og han blir beskyldt for udåden.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Bankraneren Tom forsøker å legge sin kriminelle fortid på hylla. Men da han innser at FBI er mer korrupte enn ham blir det en hard kamp for å renvaske navnet sitt.

programme.title: Fortress: Sniper's Eye
programme.desc: Den pensjonerte CIA-agenten Robert legger ut på en dristig redningsaksjon av erkefiendens enke, Sasha. Men snart blir Robert konfrontert med et kjent ansikt han trodde han aldri ville se igjen...

programme.title: Till Death
programme.desc: Etter en romantisk kveld i deres avsidesliggende hus, våkner Emma opp lenket til sin døde ektemann. Hun er fanget og isolert og må kjempe mot leiemordere for å unnslippe ektemannens avsindige plan.

programme.title: Official Secrets
programme.desc: Den sanne historien om en britisk varsler som lekket informasjon til media om en ulovlig NSA-operasjon, hvis formål var å presse FNs sikkerhetsråd til å godkjenne invasjonen av Irak i 2003.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: Når en amerikansk by blir invadert av nordkoreanske soldater, kommer en gruppe unge mennesker sammen for å beskytte hverandre, frigjøre byen og gjenvinne sin frihet.

programme.title: Taken
programme.desc: Den tidligere agenten Bryan Mills begynner de lengste 96 timene i sitt liv når han tar opp jakten på mennene som kidnappet datteren hans.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Eleanor Rigby: Them
programme.desc: Engang var Conor og Eleanor lykkelig gift. Nå føler de seg fremmed for hverandre, og i kjølevannet av en tragisk hendelse lengter de etter å finne tilbake til det liv og den kjærligheten de engang hadde.

programme.title: Wildfire: Close Shave
programme.desc: Kris is reunited with Wildfire in time to race on the world's biggest stage, in the Breeders Invitational Stakes.

programme.title: Wildfire: Fairy Tale Endings
programme.desc: In the third-season premiere, Kris learns what happened to Kerry while Raintree deals with the unexpected fallout of the Breeders' Cup win.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Feud
programme.desc: Kris resorts to desperate measures to ease Raintree's financial crisis.

programme.title: Wildfire: Moving On
programme.desc: Kris has a falling-out with Jean over Wildfire's readiness to race again.

programme.title: Wildfire: Close To Home
programme.desc: The destruction of Kris's trailer by fire forces her to move into the Ritters' house, which brings her closer to an old flame.

programme.title: Wildfire: Love Vs. Work
programme.desc: Kris is distracted by the return of her rival, Tina Sharp (Amy Jo Johnson), who is tapped to ride a Raintree boarder's horse that used to belong to the Davis ranch.

programme.title: Wildfire: Kiss Kiss
programme.desc: Kris is overcome by emotion when she helps Matt and Junior try to save Flame from being sold by Junior's dad.

programme.title: Wildfire: Push Me/Pull You
programme.desc: Kris worries about her status at Raintree after Gillian moves into the bunkhouse with Matt and begins offering unsolicited advice about Wildfire's training.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Good-Bye
programme.desc: With Raintree in dire financial straits, Jean and Matt's willingness to consider a buyer's offer draws criticism from Pablo and Kris.

programme.title: Wildfire: Heartless
programme.desc: Kris increasingly becomes the object of Matt's affection; this renders his relationship with Gillian incompatible.

programme.title: Wildfire: Diplomacy
programme.desc: Kris and Matt's rekindled relationship comes as a shock to Junior, who is distracted by consoling Dani in her time of mourning.

programme.title: Wildfire: You Can't Count On Me
programme.desc: Kris' endeavors to get accustomed to her new relationship with Matt and deal with Pablo's departure are interrupted by a surprise visit from her half brother (Ignacio Serricchio).

programme.title: Wildfire: Picking Sides
programme.desc: Kris tries to repair the rift between Matt and Junior, but the tension is exacerbated by the approach of the important Bristol Stakes and the return of Gillian, who proceeds to resume her bonding with Junior.

programme.title: Wildfire: So Long, Pardner
programme.desc: In the third-season finale, Kris and Matt weigh a generous offer from Sheik Omar that would go a long way toward easing Raintree's financial woes---but that also may be against the law.

programme.title: Wildfire: The More Things Change: Part 1
programme.desc: The fourth season begins six months after Kris was forced out of Raintree, which has undergone significant operational changes that leave Matt pining for the past.

programme.title: Wildfire: The More Things Change: Part 2
programme.desc: After Kris unexpectedly returns for a glimpse of Wildfire's next race, she gains an unlikely ally and a place to stay.

programme.title: Wildfire: Calm
programme.desc: Jean and Pablo are adamant that Kris leave town instead of sticking around and helping to care for Wildfire.

programme.title: Wildfire: Flames
programme.desc: Kris and Junior help Matt with his improbable plan to get Raintree back in the horse-racing business, which involves finding Wildfire's offspring, Flame.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Friend
programme.desc: Junior's preoccupation with his and Calvin's business proposition takes time away from his wedding plans, but Laura suspects his loss of focus may have something to do with Kris.

programme.title: Wildfire: Friendship/Passion
programme.desc: The pressure is on Junior to decide whether or not to go through with his wedding to Laura after he and Kris share a moment of passion.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: On the Case: Footprints and Whispers
programme.desc: A beloved husband and wife are found dead in their own home. Will the killers own words bring him to justice?

programme.title: On the Case: Pattern of Violence
programme.desc: A 22 year old real estate agent is discovered strangled to death inside a model home she was trying to sell.

programme.title: On the Case: Field of Nightmares
programme.desc: A young mother and son are found shot to death in a quiet Texas field. Would a mysterious bag left at the crime scene hold the key to catching their killer?

programme.title: On the Case: Snake in the Grass
programme.desc: A cloud of smoke leads two truckers to a shocking discovery; the smoldering remains of a teenage girl.

programme.title: On the Case: Fatal Turn
programme.desc: A devoted mother vanishes on her way home from work. Her disappearance sends police into the darkest corners of the state and our justice system.

programme.title: On the Case: A Stranger's Knock
programme.desc: When firefighters respond to a house fire they discover a woman shot and killed inside. Police must unlock the mystery of who started the blaze to solve the murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Last Rites
programme.desc: When a nun is found strangled and stabbed to death on the day before Easter, investigators are forced to look behind church walls in search of a killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder by the Numbers?
programme.desc: A small town is outraged when its unofficial mayor is the victim of a vicious attack at work. The police investigation uncovers a number of possible suspects and a confusing trail of evidence but will it lead them to the person who committed the crime?

programme.title: On the Case: A Thin Disguise
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger ambushes a family as they pull into their driveway. Could the memories of a five year old girl be the key to solving the crime?

programme.title: On the Case: Bound by the Truth
programme.desc: When a retired professor is found murdered, police must figure out whether the victim's son and daughter in law were eyewitnesses or the killers.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder in Room 205
programme.desc: A young woman's journey to a new life comes to a savage end in a roadside motel.

programme.title: On the Case: Sirens in the Night
programme.desc: Paula takes a look at the shocking discovery of a mysterious young woman who is found in the ashes of a fire.

programme.title: On the Case: Fatal Errand
programme.desc: When a young woman vanishes after stepping out to buy salad dressing, police try to provide answers to her fiancé and family.

programme.title: On the Case: Blood Money
programme.desc: After 21 years, DNA analysis of a blood-stained dollar bill helps to solve the murder of gas station clerk Bradley Perry.

programme.title: On the Case: A Deadly Betrayal
programme.desc: A beloved father of two is executed after a friendly poker game. Were the stakes too high? Or would police find the truth much closer to home?

programme.title: On the Case: Mystery, Heartbreak and Justice
programme.desc: A look at three cases in which the quest for justice rages on after the verdict has been delivered.

programme.title: On the Case: Trail of Carnage
programme.desc: When 25 year old Laci Hill vanishes without a trace; police receive the key to solving the mystery from her kidnapper's wife.

programme.title: On the Case: The Ultimate Sin
programme.desc: A man's crisis of conscience unravels a decades old mystery behind a young girl's murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Driven to Kill
programme.desc: A new father comes home to find his infant son and wife missing. Four months later their bodies are found in a remote wooded area. When police investigate the father's past they find the reason for the unthinkable crime.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Push Comes to Shove
programme.desc: Trying to make his mark at Buffalo, Duane lands two more Electra contracts. But his over- zealous efforts result in a clash with the crew and with Joe, and a down-to-the-wire midnight departure to meet a deadline.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The Doghouse
programme.desc: Duane's decision to leave the Electra crew unsupervised while he spends time at home jeopardizes the completion of a major contract, and could cost him his job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Strip
programme.desc: Mechanic Jimmy is sent to a northern mining camp to create an ice landing strip on a remote lake where AJ will have to land a DC-3 and the much bigger C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Expect the Unexpected
programme.desc: Engine troubles on the C-46 during the valley run force Devan to shut down an engine. High winds wreak havoc for Devan and his crew on another C-46 mission to help clean up an oil spill in the Northwest Territories.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Coming Home
programme.desc: Rookie waterbomber pilot Scott gets his first taste of action when Buffalo responds to an emergency callout to fight fires in Alberta. Mikey and Rod think they hit the jackpot when they buy a million dollar firefighting plane on eBay at a bargain price.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Dark Skies
programme.desc: When Yellowknife and the northern aviation community are rocked by three crashes in the space of a month, Joe places an extra emphasis on safety, which is why he only trusts himself to perform a dangerous-looking DC-3 stunt.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Shut Down
programme.desc: Joe receives a negative visit from Transport Canada when inspectors threaten to shut down the airline. Ray and the Electra crew fly to Sachs Harbour to pick up a unique load - the hides, wool, and meat of 250 musk oxen.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Tale of Two Pilots
programme.desc: Weighed down by the responsibility of training a new rampie, and struggling to get out of Joe's doghouse, DC-3 co-pilot Tyler gets a once in a lifetime opportunity to stunt fly in his Cessna 150 for a visiting film crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Jam
programme.desc: After taking command of an intense airlift, and dealing with the ugliest Electra load he's ever seen, Scott takes a scary fall on the icy tarmac.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Very Buffalo Christmas
programme.desc: A week before Christmas, Buffalo agrees to lend a hand to an RCMP initiative to fly toys to isolated communities in the north. But a series of problems with the Electra leave the company in a jam.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Crash Landing
programme.desc: Just months from retiring, Electra captain Ray Weber leads his crew on a multi-trip mission that requires landing on a rough ice strip on a remote lake.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: For Sale By Owner
programme.desc: When South Korean buyers come to Buffalo to look at a water bomber, the pressure is on mechanic Cory to get the plane ready. But a landing gear emergency puts him and chief pilot Justin in serious danger.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Over Seas
programme.desc: Buffalo has to get a CL-215 water bomber to buyers in Korea. So Justin and Cory fly the plane to Vancouver Harbour, where it will be hoisted onto a cargo ship sailing across the Pacific Ocean to its destination a method of delivery no one has ever tried.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Water Wings
programme.desc: In South Korea, Cory and Justin meet the ship delivering Buffalo's water bomber plane to new buyers there. But the boys are frustrated by the buyers' poor planning.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Meltdown
programme.desc: As spring arrives and Ray's retirement day approaches, Sean surprises everyone by leaving Buffalo for a job with the competition. So Buffalo brings in Electra pilot Brian Harrison to finish the contract.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: North Atlantic Convoy
programme.desc: Greenland's Narsarsuaq airport - known as one the world's most dangerous approaches - looms on the horizon as Cory and Justin begin a trans-global journey to deliver two CL-215 water bombers to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Sunk
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey hire a helicopter for a salvage mission to retrieve the rare tailpiece from a Lockheed 10-A that crashed in the Yellowknife woods forty years ago.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Turkey or Bust
programme.desc: Justin and Cory are stranded in Croatia while trying to complete the delivery of two CL-215 water bombers to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Cold Start
programme.desc: Mikey links up with Chris Hadfield aboard the International Space Station. Problems mount while trying to get a frozen DC-4 airborne. A landing gear collapse on the runway sends the entire crew scrambling.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Shootout
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot David faces a remote Arctic airstrip with sketchy landing gear. Mikey drafts a Buffalo hockey team to face off against an NHL squad in a charity shootout. Chuck gets a chance to shine on the ice.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Early Bird Special
programme.desc: Vintage Shooting Star carnival game; professional Mixed Martial Arts octagon fighting cage.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Jersey Score
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Årets Bästa Drevjakt - 16 Vilt!
programme.desc: Jompen & Danne beger sig till Sörmland för två dagars drevjakt. Resultatet blir minst sagt något utöver det vanliga!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jompen Och Danne På Skoveljakt
programme.desc: Jompen och Danne är och jagar skovel i Sörmland. Det blir en episk film och en mycket lyckad jakt för båda två.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Kattis Jagar Vildsvin & Toppfågel
programme.desc: Äntligen är Kattis tillbaka i rutan! Vi får följa med på en händelserik drevjakt med mängder av vildsvin. Inte nog med det så blir det jakt med ställande hund på Vildsvin!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Drevjakt på kronhjort
programme.desc: Drevjakt och hundförare hos Simon. Massa vildsvin & kronhjort på marken!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Pyrschjakt
programme.desc: Jompen smyger runt i ekbackar på jakt efter dovhjort

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Skyttetävling & Radiogrisen 2.0
programme.desc: Sako & Varpsund bjuder in till skyttetävling där Jakt är Jakt ställs mot Side by Side och Shots & Pots!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jakt På Kapital Kronhjort & En Liten Gåsjakt
programme.desc: Pierre ger sig ut på jakt efter kronhjort. Det blir en spännande jakt med ett vackert avslut!
programme.sub-title: Jakt På Kapital Kronhjort & En Liten Gåsjakt

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Nya Jägare
programme.desc: Danne är bjuden på en drevjakt som Sveaskog håller i samarbete med jägareförbundet, där nyexaminerade jägare för testa på att jaga. Lärorikt och spännande situationer i veckans drevjakt!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Gäddjakt I Roslagen & Jakt På Vildren
programme.desc: Jompen ger sig ut på en ny slags jakt i Roslagen.
programme.sub-title: Gäddjakt I Roslagen & Jakt På Vildren

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jakt Och Skogslära
programme.desc: Jompen beger sig till Götaland för att jaga och besöka Anna Stridsman, skogsvårdschef på Svea Skog, för att lära sig om betesskador och sättet markägare ser på jakten.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Foderplats
programme.desc: Jompen bygger sin första foderplats för att locka vildsvinen från åkrarna.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Pierre Skjuter 4 Vildsvin
programme.desc: Under vår och tidig sommar jagar Pierre väldigt mycket vildsvin i spannmålen, i det här avsnittet tar han med oss på en samling spännande jakter han har varit med om.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jakt På Ringduva
programme.desc: Lubbe jagar ringduva i Uppland helt ensam. Trodde han tills filmteamet dök upp.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jompens Första Drevjakt
programme.desc: Lubbe tar med Jompen på hans första drevjakt. Det sprutar vildsvin ur varenda buske, men Jompen har tankarna på annat håll.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Bockpremiären
programme.desc: 16 Augusti, Bockpremiär. Självklart beger vi oss till Blommeröd för att ta del av magiska jaktupplevelser och kulinariska mästerverk av Carl Dreyer.

programme.title: Vilterian: Burgare & Rygg
programme.desc: I detta avsnitt besöker Jompen Kim Nyström på Slottsholmen där det bjuds på vildsvinsburgare och en svårfångad förrätt.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Klappjakt
programme.desc: Lubbe och Jompen är i Östergötland på klappjakt. Vildsvin, Rådjur och slow motion står på menyn.

programme.title: Vilterian: Höstgryta
programme.desc: Kim och Jompen lagar en delikat viltgryta på hotell Slottsholmen i Västervik. Ännu ett avsnitt med fantastiskt god mat gjord från naturens godaste och bästa råvara - viltkött!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Vildsvinsteori
programme.desc: Mats lär Jompen allt han kan om skyddsjakt och hur man pratar med älgar.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Bockjakt Och Skyttetips Vid Smygjakt & Älgpremiär
programme.desc: Bockjakt & skyttetips vid smygjakt. Pierre pratar om det avgörande ögonblicket under jakt - skottet och sedan jagar han rådjur med lockpipa.
programme.sub-title: Bockjakt Och Skyttetips Vid Smygjakt & Älgpremiär

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Sista Älgjakten
programme.desc: En fantastisk tredagars älgjakt i vintermiljö med Jompen. Kattis och Danne ansluter även sista dagen. Det blir säsongens sista älgjakt, missa inte!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Hummerfiske Och Matlagning
programme.desc: Jompen, Calle och Danne är i Torekov för att fiska hummer och makrill. Danne får strafflotten och beger sig på en annan typ av jakt. Allt jagat hamnar på grillen under Calles magiska hand.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Skarvjakt
programme.desc: Jompen och Anders beger sig ut i roslagens skärgård på skarvjakt! Syftet med denna jaktformen så här års är att freda Abborren. Häng med på ett grymt roligt äventyr med massa pangpang!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Två Dagars Drevjakt
programme.desc: Jompen är ute på en minst sagt händelserik drevjakt på Vibyholm i Sörmland. Massa vilt, missa inte!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Nyårsspecial
programme.desc: Sista avsnittet år 2020 och det firar Jompen hos Calle Dreyer nere i Blommeröd. Videon slutar med lite fina klipp från våra filmer i 2020 och en hälsning från alla oss!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Smygjakt På Svart Dovhjort & Vildsvinsjakt Med Ställande Hundar
programme.desc: Jompen & Anders är bjudna på en väldigt spännande smygjakt på Åda! En av sveriges viltrikaste marker när det kommer till dovhjort!
programme.sub-title: Smygjakt På Svart Dovhjort & Vildsvinsjakt Med Ställande Hundar

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Småland Drevjakt
programme.desc: Lubbe och Jompen är i Småland på drevjakt. Förmiddagen och dagen blir inte riktigt som dom planerat...

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Hageljakt På Rådjur Med Drever
programme.desc: Jompen, Danne & Tottie är bjudna på en traditionell hageljakt med Drever.

programme.title: Vilterian: Ribs

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Farrah tilkaller politiet etter en heftig krangel med moren. Amber lurer på om hun er gravid, og dermed kan glemme å fullføre skolegangen. Maci saksøker Ryan for å få barnebidrag, og Catelynn må flytte ut av huset til kjæresten Tyler.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Catelynn risikerer å miste kjæresten, mens Ambers kjæreste sier at han kanskje vil forlate henne. Farrah balanserer college, ny jobb, og å bo alene med datteren. Maci innser at hun ikke kan bo sammen med både venner og babyen.
programme.sub-title: Should I Stay or Should I Go?

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Maci går ut med jentene og møter en gammel flamme. Babygråt og urealistiske forventninger ødelegger Amber og Garys romantiske middag. Tyler har dårlig samvittighet etter adopsjonen, og Farrah avslører en hemmelighet om barnefaren.

programme.title: The Hills: New City, New Drama
programme.desc: Når Lauren Conrad må mestre både moteskolen, en krevende praktikantjobb og en uforutsigbar romkamerat som ødelegger for henne, forstår hun raskt at alt er stort i Los Angeles, også hennes egne problemer.

programme.title: The Hills: A Change of Plans
programme.desc: Når Heidi fikser et intervju for drømmejobben som får henne til å overveie å hoppe av skolen permanent, forstår Lauren at hun og Heidi kanskje har helt forskjellige mål.

programme.title: The Hills: An Unexpected Call
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sender Lauren på et oppdrag til New York City, men vel tilbake i L.A. venter det henne en stor overraskelse fra fortiden. Heidi skjønner at å jobbe med festreklamering ikke bare er en fest.

programme.title: The Hills: Lauren and Jason: Part 2
programme.desc: Da Jason, Laurens eksflamme fra Laguna Beach, dukker opp igjen i livet hennes, forstår hun at hun kanskje ikke er så ferdig med ham som hun trodde. Samtidig, i sin nye jobb, spør Heidi seg om det egentlig er verdt alt strevet.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Ebony fra Colorado Springs tar militærutdanning, men må bytte ut uniformen med mammaklær. Hun og kjæresten Josh vil inn i flyvåpenet, men en baby kan hindre dem i å verve seg, eller til og med i å fullføre skolen.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Sørstatsjenta Whitney er familiens baby, men da både hun og moren blir gravide, blir det for fullt i huset. Whitney og kjæresten Weston må flytte ut og stifte sin egen familie.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Vision of Murder
programme.desc: An investigation into the 2010 death of Kelly Brennan, and her friend Sheila Trott's dream in which she perceived Brennan to be in danger. Brennan was later found bludgeoned to death.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Caught in the Crossfire - Part 2
programme.desc: A report about Charla and Darren Mack, a married, childless couple who were swingers who liked to attend group sex parties. After their daughter Erika was born, Charla was no longer interested in swinging and their marriage began to crumble.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Perilous Journey
programme.desc: An investigation into the sometimes questionable practices in the business of international adoptions and how some overseas facilitators walk a fine line between adoption and child trafficking.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Wounded by Love
programme.desc: An investigation into the death of Phillip Peatross, who was shot in the bedroom of his girlfriend, Caryn Kelley. Kelley claimed Peatross shot himself, but the police suspected foul play.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder on the Cape
programme.desc: An a-list fashion writer leaves her fast-track career and becomes a single mom, but she also becomes the only murder victim in 30 years in her serene Cape Cod town

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Biggest Gamble
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the October 2005 disappearance of Christine Wilson, a 27-year-old from Sacramento, California.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Portrait of a Killer
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Devil's Island
programme.desc: A report on the disappearance and death of Yvonne Baldelli, a California woman who moved to Panama with her boyfriend Brian Brimager, an ex-Marine , who turned out not to be as perfect to her as he seemed.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Cal Harris: The Final Verdict
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman gets a final verdict after facing multiple trials for the murder of his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Country Club Murders
programme.desc: A report on professional poker player Ernie Scherer III, the chief suspect in the 2008 murders of his parents, Charlene and Ernest, in their Castlewood Country Club home in Pleasanton, California.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Don't Scream
programme.desc: An investigation on Tiffany Mead of Davis County, Utah, a young mother who called 911 claiming she had sliced her own throat while her ex-husband and child watched.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Fight for Melissa
programme.desc: Melissa Calusinski, is a young woman who claims she did not murder 16-month-old Ben Kingan in 2009, while working at a day care center in Lake County, Illinois, despite having confessed to the crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Show Me the Money
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the 2010 shooting death of Wall Street millionaire John Bender, who was killed in his exotic home in Costa Rica. His wife, Ann, is charged with the crime, but she claims innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: The Long Road Home
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.
programme.sub-title: Live to Tell: The Long Road Home

programme.title: 48 Hours: What Happened in Apartment 1601?
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: No Way Out
programme.desc: The owners of St. Rita's Nursing Home in St. Bernard Parish, La., are charged with negligent homicide after 35 residents died in the flood waters of Hurricane Katrina.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Three Days Before Christmas
programme.desc: The story of sisters Linae and Tricia Tiede who in December 1990, were held hostage by two men -- Von Lester Taylor and Edward Steven Deli.
programme.sub-title: Live to Tell: Three Days Before Christmas

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Mysterious Death of Tiffiney Crawford
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.
programme.sub-title: The Mysterious Death of Tiffiney Crawford

programme.title: 48 Hours: Soccer Moms Confidential
programme.desc: A report on the investigation of ex-cop turned private eye Chris Butler who staffed his San Francisco Bay area firm with local soccer moms to solve cases.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL World log lift championship, Lithuania
programme.desc: The Strongman Champions League Log Lift World Championships form part of the sport expo organised by Zydrunas Savickas., Fourteen competitors aim to top the ‘Big Z’s’ record lifting three different weights over their head.
programme.sub-title: SCL World log lift championship, Lithuania

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL Lithuania
programme.desc: In Vilnius, the city where one of the most powerful strongmen Žydr?nas Savickas lives, strongmen take on classics like tractor pulling and shield carrying. The ‘Big Z’ has won the title four times.

programme.title: World Chase Tag 6 US Championship: WCT6 US Championship
programme.desc: Segui gli emozionanti match di World Chase Tag, il campionato internazionale di parkour competitivo che prevede il gioco dell'acchiapparella.

programme.title: World Chase Tag 6 US Championship: WCT6 US Championship
programme.desc: Segui gli emozionanti match di World Chase Tag, il campionato internazionale di parkour competitivo che prevede il gioco dell'acchiapparella.

programme.title: World Chase Tag 6 US Championship: WCT6 US Championship
programme.desc: Segui gli emozionanti match di World Chase Tag, il campionato internazionale di parkour competitivo che prevede il gioco dell'acchiapparella.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL Serbia
programme.desc: In a very sunny 30 degrees atmosphere, deep in the mountains of Serbia, the SCL train stopped in Zlatibor for stage 6 of the MLO Strongman Champions League. Eleven, including former champion Martin Wildauer.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL Bulgaria
programme.desc: Plovdiv, Ancient, second-largest city in Bulgaria hosts the next stage of the Strongman Champions League. Current leader in World Series is Matjaz Belsak, the youngest competitor and strongest man of Slovenia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL England 2016
programme.desc: At Guildford Spectrum - a one stop leisure facility where you can enjoy ice skating, ten pin bowling, swimming and a whole range of sporting.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL Finland
programme.desc: Strongmen from all over the globe came to city of Vaasa in Finland, which is famous for its so-called ‘white nights’ to test their strength in the 9th stage of Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Sports Gone Wild: Episode 17
programme.desc: Sports blooper clip show

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL Portugal
programme.desc: In Lithuania, Marius Lalas secured a second win, beating Grzegorz Szyma?ski. Both competitors now have two SCL victories overall. Will either of them secure a third win in Portugal before the World grand finals?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL Martinique
programme.desc: Next stop in our SCL caravan before the grand finale is paradise on Earth – Martinique. Eight strongmen from all over the World compete for the champion’s title and the World grand finals in Turkey.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: Lightweight world championship, Norway
programme.desc: The competition returns to Norway - one of the most beautiful countries on Earth. For the second time in this season, the country hosts the strongest men on the planet.

programme.title: MMA GALLA & DM 2022: MMA GALLA & DM 2022 - Part 1
programme.desc: MMA GALLA & DM 2022

programme.title: MMA GALLA & DM 2022: MMA GALLA & DM 2022 - Part 2
