programme.title: South Park: Agentbyrået
programme.desc: Som talentmanagere kan Cartman, Stan og Kenny innkassere 10 % av klientenes inntekter, men et annet byrå stjeler deres eneste klient.

programme.title: South Park: En million små fibre
programme.desc: Towelie skriver en bok som blir valgt ut til Oprahs bokklubb og blir en bestselger blant folk som vil overvinne avhengighet.

programme.title: South Park: Mysteriet med toeren på pissoaret
programme.desc: Cartman tror han vet hvem som står bak angrepene 11. september.

programme.title: South Park: Momben
programme.desc: Innbyggerne i South Park forbereder seg til et besøk av Hillary Clinton. Cartman mistenker at en muslimsk elev er involvert i et mulig terroristangrep.

programme.title: South Park: Mer drittproblemer
programme.desc: Randy slår verdensrekorden 'største bæsj', og den tidligere rekordinnehaveren Bono vil ha tilbake tronen. Men han har en mørk hemmelighet som kanskje kan hindre ham.

programme.title: South Park: Britneys nye stil
programme.desc: Mediesirkuset kommer til South Park når Britney gjemmer seg i den avsidesliggende fjellbyen. Guttene prøver å hjelpe den plagede popstjernen.

programme.title: South Park: Kina-problemet
programme.desc: Cartman blir forskrekket over den storslåtte OL-seremonien og ber Butters om hjelp til å konfrontere kineserne. Samtidig blir Stan og Kyle vitne til 'voldtekten' av Indiana Jones.

programme.title: South Park: Ringen
programme.desc: Kenny tar med den nye kjæresten sin til en Jonas Brothers-konsert der de får kyskhetsringer.

programme.title: South Park: Fiskepikker
programme.desc: Jimmi er rasende for at Cartmann prøver å ta æren for en vits som han fant på og som nå er blitt populær i hele landet. Men en sint Kanye West klarer ikke å forstå poenget.

programme.title: South Park: Døde kjendiser
programme.desc: Michael Jacksons spøkelse nekter å akseptere å måtte vandre heden og etterlater resten av de nylig avdøde berømtheter frustrert i Skjærsilden.

programme.title: South Park: Sexhjelpen
programme.desc: Kyle og Butters befinner seg midt blant Amerikas superkjendiser når de gjennomgår en behandling for sexavhengighet. Cartman og Stan er limt til Tiger Woods-kampen.

programme.title: South Park: Lattermaskinen
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt gjort narr av på The South Park Elementary Comedy Awards, bygger Germany en uovervinnerlig lattermaskin: Funnybot. Men dens planer for menneskeheten går likevel ikke altfor bra.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman finner kjærligheten
programme.desc: Cartman spiller matchmaker når en ny jente flytter til South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Kravene heves
programme.desc: Cartman innrømmer endelig at han er feit og får umiddelbart en permobil.

programme.title: South Park: Hobbiten
programme.desc: Wendy prøver å pare en av sine venninner med Butters, men hun ender opp på kontoret til skolekuratoren.

programme.title: South Park: #Oppkok
programme.desc: Kyle vil bare spille tv-spill med lillebroren sin. Men da Ike vil ikke spille med ham mer, blir Kyle redd for at neste generasjon vil forbigå ham.

programme.title: South Park: Glade hologram
programme.desc: Cartman trender, mens resten av USA forbereder seg til det største juleprogrammet på tv noensinne.

programme.title: South Park: Fabuløs og modig
programme.desc: Gutta viser Caitlyn Jenner sin enormt store respekt i det mest fabuløse og modige 'South Park'-avsnittet noensinne.

programme.title: South Park: Trygt sted
programme.desc: Cartman er siste offer innen kroppsskam.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Den nye gutten i klassen overtaler Jesus til å kjempe mot Satan, i det endelige oppgjøret mellom godt og ondt. Cartman blir rasende når han oppdager at oppgjøret krasjer med bursdagsfesten hans.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Cartmans mor er en hore
programme.desc: Dr. Mephisto hjelper Cartman med å avsløre farens identitet, og alle mannlige innbyggere i South Park er aktuelle kandidater.

programme.title: South Park: Byen ved avgrunnens rand (tilbakeblikk)
programme.desc: Skolebussen krasjer i en snøstorm og blir stående på kanten av et stup.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: Chef prøver å kreve royalties da et plateselskap slipper en låt han hevder han skrev for over 20 år siden.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Tamponger av cherokeehår
programme.desc: Kyle trenger nyretransplantasjon og Cartman er den perfekte donor, men setter en høy pris for nyren: 10 millioner dollar.

programme.title: South Park: Her kommer nabolaget
programme.desc: Token føler seg ensom fordi han er eneste rike barn i byen, og lokker andre velstående mennesker til South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Den nye Terrance og Phillip-filmtraileren
programme.desc: Alle barna i South Park er superspente på å se den første traileren for den nye Terrance og Phillip-filmen.

programme.title: South Park: Krazy Kripples
programme.desc: Jimmy og Timmy blir medlemmer av gjengen The Crips, som de tror er en klubb for funksjonshemmede.

programme.title: South Park: Feitrumpe og pannekakehode
programme.desc: Cartman lager en J-Lo-fingerdukke til et arrangement som skal hylle latinamerikanere.

programme.title: South Park: Dum, bortskjemt hore-leketøy
programme.desc: Paris Hilton åpner butikk i South Park og forderver jentenes moral - bare Wendy holder fast på sine prinsipper.

programme.title: South Park: Agentbyrået
programme.desc: Som talentmanagere kan Cartman, Stan og Kenny innkassere 10 % av klientenes inntekter, men et annet byrå stjeler deres eneste klient.

programme.title: South Park: En million små fibre
programme.desc: Towelie skriver en bok som blir valgt ut til Oprahs bokklubb og blir en bestselger blant folk som vil overvinne avhengighet.

programme.title: South Park: Mysteriet med toeren på pissoaret
programme.desc: Cartman tror han vet hvem som står bak angrepene 11. september.

programme.title: South Park: Momben
programme.desc: Innbyggerne i South Park forbereder seg til et besøk av Hillary Clinton. Cartman mistenker at en muslimsk elev er involvert i et mulig terroristangrep.

programme.title: South Park: Mer drittproblemer
programme.desc: Randy slår verdensrekorden 'største bæsj', og den tidligere rekordinnehaveren Bono vil ha tilbake tronen. Men han har en mørk hemmelighet som kanskje kan hindre ham.

programme.title: South Park: Dø, hippie, dø
programme.desc: Cartman blir arrestert for å fange hippier, men når South Park blir oversvømmet av hippier, vender de seg til ham og hans uvanlige metoder for hippiefjerning.

programme.title: South Park: Agentbyrået
programme.desc: Som talentmanagere kan Cartman, Stan og Kenny innkassere 10 % av klientenes inntekter, men et annet byrå stjeler deres eneste klient.

programme.title: South Park: Mer drittproblemer
programme.desc: Randy slår verdensrekorden 'største bæsj', og den tidligere rekordinnehaveren Bono vil ha tilbake tronen. Men han har en mørk hemmelighet som kanskje kan hindre ham.

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O
programme.desc: Stan og Kyle står overfor sitt store gjennombrudd med Guitar Hero-ferdighetene sine. Manageren deres overbeviser Stan om at Kyle holder ham tilbake, og skaper spenninger mellom dem.

programme.title: South Park: Barneskolemusikal
programme.desc: Musikalfeberen når South Park, og guttene må spille med eller miste popularitet.

programme.title: South Park: Ringen
programme.desc: Kenny tar med den nye kjæresten sin til en Jonas Brothers-konsert der de får kyskhetsringer.

programme.title: South Park: Fiskepikker
programme.desc: Jimmi er rasende for at Cartmann prøver å ta æren for en vits som han fant på og som nå er blitt populær i hele landet. Men en sint Kanye West klarer ikke å forstå poenget.

programme.title: South Park: Tiss
programme.desc: Høyt urininnhold i svømmebassenget fører til en katastrofe som ødelegger guttas dag, særlig Kyles. Og Cartmans xenofobi får fritt utløp igjen.

programme.title: South Park: Broadway-brødrene
programme.desc: Når Randy forstår hemmeligheten bak musikaler, kan han ikke slutte med å ta med seg Sharon for å se dem. Andrew Lloyd-Webber og Elton John advarer ham mot å avsløre deres hemmelighet.

programme.title: South Park: Butter slår tilbake
programme.desc: Butters blir i hemmelighet plaget av sin bestemor og Stan ønsker å øke bevisstheten om farene ved mobbing. Stans idé er å spille inn en stor dansevideo, men suksessen raskt går til hodet på ham.

programme.title: South Park: Glutenfri ebola
programme.desc: South Park blir glutenfritt.

programme.title: South Park: Pre-CIS
programme.desc: Ifølge Eric Cartman har Wendy Testaburger blitt lesbisk.

programme.title: South Park: Du yelper ikke til
programme.desc: Cartman ser seg som den beste restaurantkritikeren på nettet i South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Legg den fra deg
programme.desc: Nord-Korea sikter mot South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Hummel-figurer og heroin
programme.desc: Feirede underholdere faller fra i sine beste år på grunn av massive overdoser av opiater. Stan er i ferd med å bli avslørt som kilden til de illegale stoffene.

programme.title: South Park: Dobbeltrøbbel i Kina
programme.desc: Randy ser en mulighet for Tegridy i China.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Chefs salte sjokoladeboller
programme.desc: Chef får ikke solgt karamellene sine på en filmfestival, så han går over til salte sjokoladeballer og lager en reklamesang.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: Chef prøver å kreve royalties da et plateselskap slipper en låt han hevder han skrev for over 20 år siden.

programme.title: South Park: Regnskog sjmegnskog
programme.desc: Guttene sendes til regnskogen i Costa Rica med et kor.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Verdens største blokkfløytekonsert
programme.desc: Klassen skal spille på en blokkfløytekonsert i Mr Garrisons hjemby i Arkansas, og forsøker å finne den mystiske 'brune lyden'.

programme.title: South Park: Timmy 2000
programme.desc: Guttene hermer etter Timmy, som har ADHD, for å slippe å gjøre lekser.

programme.title: South Park: Noe du kan gjøre med fingeren din
programme.desc: Guttene danner boybandet 'Fingerbang' og får spillejobb på kjøpesenteret.
programme.sub-title: Noe du kan gjøre med fingeren din

programme.title: South Park: Musikalen 'Hellen Keller!'
programme.desc: Guttene setter opp sin egen versjon av Helen Kellers historie for å overgå barnehagens forestilling.

programme.title: South Park: En stige til himmelen
programme.desc: Guttene bryter seg inn for å stjele urnen med Kennys aske.

programme.title: South Park: Feitrumpe og pannekakehode
programme.desc: Cartman lager en J-Lo-fingerdukke til et arrangement som skal hylle latinamerikanere.

programme.title: South Park: Kristne rocker hardt
programme.desc: Cartman er fast bestemt på å få platinaplate med sitt nye kristne band Faith+1.

programme.title: South Park: Moro med kampsportvåpen
programme.desc: Guttene kjøper våpen på et loppemarked og blir forvandlet til japanske anime-krigere, med alvorlige konsekvenser for stakkars Butters.

programme.title: South Park: Dø, hippie, dø
programme.desc: Cartman blir arrestert for å fange hippier, men når South Park blir oversvømmet av hippier, vender de seg til ham og hans uvanlige metoder for hippiefjerning.

programme.title: South Park: Agentbyrået
programme.desc: Som talentmanagere kan Cartman, Stan og Kenny innkassere 10 % av klientenes inntekter, men et annet byrå stjeler deres eneste klient.

programme.title: South Park: Mer drittproblemer
programme.desc: Randy slår verdensrekorden 'største bæsj', og den tidligere rekordinnehaveren Bono vil ha tilbake tronen. Men han har en mørk hemmelighet som kanskje kan hindre ham.

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O
programme.desc: Stan og Kyle står overfor sitt store gjennombrudd med Guitar Hero-ferdighetene sine. Manageren deres overbeviser Stan om at Kyle holder ham tilbake, og skaper spenninger mellom dem.

programme.title: South Park: Barneskolemusikal
programme.desc: Musikalfeberen når South Park, og guttene må spille med eller miste popularitet.

programme.title: South Park: Ringen
programme.desc: Kenny tar med den nye kjæresten sin til en Jonas Brothers-konsert der de får kyskhetsringer.

programme.title: South Park: Fiskepikker
programme.desc: Jimmi er rasende for at Cartmann prøver å ta æren for en vits som han fant på og som nå er blitt populær i hele landet. Men en sint Kanye West klarer ikke å forstå poenget.

programme.title: South Park: Tiss
programme.desc: Høyt urininnhold i svømmebassenget fører til en katastrofe som ødelegger guttas dag, særlig Kyles. Og Cartmans xenofobi får fritt utløp igjen.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Ashley York murders her wealthy father and cleverly manipulates it to appear as though he killed himself. Dr. Sloan picks away at holes in the story, which leads him directly to Ashley.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan takes in an abandoned young girl found at the scene of a murder, while Steve and Jesse go about tracking down the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The murder of a beautiful woman around a marine encampment raises suspicions. Dr. Sloan discovers more to her than meets the eye.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan suspects a cunning D.A. in the murder of an acquitted defendant.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A man wrongfully convicted of murder takes Dr. Sloan hostage. Dr. Sloan hears his story and works to prove the man's innocence. Jesse works feverishly to rescue Mark.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan shields George Karn from both Steve and Lt. Delaney while investigating his wife's murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve heads up the investigation when a serial cop killer is on the prowl, while inadvertently dating the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: An exhausted Jesse, coming off a 48-hour stint in the hospital, witnesses a man die in the parking garage. Jesse returns with help only to find the man alive.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Amanda's cousin falls to his death when his motorcycle suddenly veers off the road. Amanda leads the investigation when it's discovered her cousin was drugged immediately before the accident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates a free health clinic after several homeless people turn up dead... with missing organs.
programme.sub-title: Living On The Streets Can Be Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan tries to solve a friend's murder while Steve investigates the deceased's ex-wife and her identical twin sister.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A visiting surgeon must deal with his alcoholism after a fellow doctor is murdered during one of his blackouts.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a photoshop erroneously sends Dr. Sloan the wrong set of photographs, he becomes embroiled in the murder investigation of an escort girl. Meanwhile, Amanda's baby is about to come to term.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: In an episode reminiscent of Hitchcock's Strangers on a Train, Dr. Sloan is drawn into a murder pact by a psychiatrist in need of money. The psychiatrist kills a woman pestering Dr. Sloan, expecting Mark to eliminate his problem.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse is attracted to a beautiful psychic, who also happens to be the prime suspect in a murder. Amanda copes with the trials of motherhood.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The daughter of one of Mark's friends writes a juicy tell-all expose of the most prominent public figures. Mark takes her in after a crazed stalker starts threatening her and her co-authors.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark investigates a perky morning television personality for the murder of a Howard Stern-like radio host.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan is the executor of his friend, Preston Michael's, estate after Michaels is found in the body of a shark.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Annie discover that a John Landis movie is shooting in their neighborhood, they jump at the chance to become extras, but Annie’s excitement turns to sheer bliss when she learns that her dream man is starring in the film.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) helps Richard (Malcolm Gets) confront unresolved issues with his jet-setting mother, Natalie (Elizabeth Ashley, “Evening Shade”), when she makes a surprise visit to New York.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) entrusts Annie(Amy Pietz) with various maid-of-honor duties, she learns that Annie’s strong suits aren’t dependability and punctuality and their frien2dship strains under the stress of preparing for Caroline’s wedding.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline is confused by nervous pangs and Del experiences panic attacks. Meanwhile, Richard decides to confess his love to Caroline as a last-ditch effort to stop her from marrying Del.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline decides that if she and Del resume dating they should abstain from lovemaking for a fortnight and instead focus on what’s at the core of their relationship.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline is thrilled when romantic sparks fly between her and the emergency room veterinarian who treats Salty for a minor injury.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline finally discovers that Richard is back in New York, she offers him his old position back and Richard must decide if he wants to be in Caroline's life again.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie finds herself being audited by IRS agent Jimmy Callahan she misconstrues his friendly manner for amorous interest.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline's young boyfriend Joe declares his undying love for her, she realizes that she is not ready for the level of commitment that Joe arrived at so quickly.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Guy Who Gets There Too Soon

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard's dream of being a paid artist comes true when he is commissioned to paint a mural for New York City.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When gentile Del falls for Risa Glickman, who only dates Jewish men, he takes drastic measures to pretend that he is Jewish.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Nice Jewish Boy

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline discovers that Richard's father is a former vaudeville comic, Ben Karinsky and tries to reunite him with a reluctant Richard.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline observes that her pet cat Salty is troubled, she consults her veterinarian boyfriend, Joe, who suggests taking Salty to an eccentric cat therapist.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie's mother shows up on Annie's doorstep with suitcase in hand, Caroline finds herself caught in the middle.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Another side of Caroline's artistic expression -- her dream of being a ballerina -- is revealed when she is locked in a laundromat overnight with a homeless man.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline and Joe's romance takes a nosedive when his ex-girlfriend Lisa returns from her Greenpeace mission and seeks shelter at Joe's apartment.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie's sister Donna visits New York in hopes of resurrecting her career, she finds the love letter Richard hid from Caroline and decides that setting the lyrics to music could be her next big hit, forcing Richard to feel slightly off-key.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Del brings one of Richard's paintings to a posh country club to impress a girl, but the best impresssion is made on a wealthy socialite, much to Richard's delight.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline cheers Richard on when he gets the chance to win big money by making the half-court free-throw shot at a New York Knicks game.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard finds himself in a life-or-death predicament when Caroline aims to boost the value of his work by convincing an influential art columnist that Richard is a deceased artist.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feels that Annie consistently chooses the men in her life over their friendship and challenges Annie to take a girls-only trip, but chaos ensues when they take a trip together and both girls find romance at a local ski resort.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline, who is trying to face single life bravely, tries her hand at an evening on the town alone, with a little coaching from Richard.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline supports Del in his efforts to expand business for her "Caroline in the City" cartoon strip and merchandise.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline's naive, helpful nature comes out in full bloom when she starts catering to her new elderly neighbor, Miriam, but Annie thinks Caroline is being taken advantage of.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that only one newspaper in the country has not renewed her cartoon strip, she obsesses on the matter until finally convincing herself to face the editors in person.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline has difficulty confronting her neglectful building superintendent, Mr. Tedescu about her faulty plumbing, so she hires a mediator to pressure Mr. Tedescu into taking care of her request.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard is stunned when his former love Julia informs him that she is about to be married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: In the ongoing charade of Caroline pretending that she and Richard are married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: A remorseful Caroline panics when she realizes that several hours have passed since she poured her heart out to Richard on his answering machine -- and she hasn't heard a response from him.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline realizes that the constant aching in her neck could be related to the stress she feels over her unresolved feelings toward Richard, but she doesn't let it get in the way of helping Richard navigate through troubled waters with Julia.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feigns having read a writer’s novel to impress him, but their first date is a disaster as Caroline’s charade crumbles. Meanwhile, Richard jumps to Julia’s rescue when her waitress job at Remo’s leaves her customers hungry for attention.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that she’s been receiving free cable, her honesty with the cable company gets her into deep trouble with her not-so-truthful neighbors.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie is visited by her old singing teacher, Miss McGowan, Caroline helps Annie pretend to still have her “Cats” role, an act that may have a surprise ending.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: It’s a game of messy politics when Caroline will not endorse a local councilman, who is inspired by her comic strip, while Del conjures up a promotional campaign.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Discreetly planning to ease Caroline’s homesick holiday blues, Richard (Malcolm Gets) goes to great lengths to get a gift for Caroline that inspires suspicion in Julia (Sofia Milos) and sleuthing from Caroline and Annie.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Used Car Salesman

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Informed by Annie (Amy Pietz) of Caroline’s (LeaThompson) unspoken love for him, Richard (Malcolm Gets) confronts Caroline, who tells him that it’s a thing of the past.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Love That Dare Not Speak Its Name

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine suddenly starts getting mysterious love letters. When she becomes intrigued by the poetic propositions, a couple of cabbies quickly claim responsibility, leaving Elaine with the hilarious task of discovering who is the amorous writer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie makes a horrible first impression on girlfriend Zena’s parents on Taxi. Louie’s romance with girlfriend Zena takes an outrageous twist when she brings him home to meet her parents.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies try to make Tony a family man when they convince him to adopt the adorably precocious eight-year-old boy named Brian whom he befriended.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a hilarious shock to the cabbies when Rev. Jim brings his new pet to the garage—an over-the-hill racehorse that he bought after cashing in on the 300-to-1 long shot. However, he soon finds that it’s impossible to housebreak a horse.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby faces a humorous predicament when it becomes obvious that one of the biggest talent managers in New York is representing him because of his prowess as a lover, and not for his ability as an actor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a protest against unsafe equipment, the cabbies go on strike, and Louie offers an unusual solution to the problem to shop steward Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a hilarious caper, Louie and the cabbies pool all their cash to buy a painting at an auction, planning to cash in big when the artist dies—but when the bidding gets too heavy, the gang turns a dignified auction into a frolicking free-for-all.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie, the dispatcher, becomes a lovesick pup after his girlfriend finds another guy. He will stop at nothing to get her back, including recruiting Alex for his hilarious scheme—and the riotous shenanigans at the Sunshine Cab Co. never stop.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a riotous family reunion when Jim returns home to face his millionaire dad for the first time since he dropped out of society in the ‘60s, and Alex has his hands full with Jim’s voluptuous, overly amorous sister,

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The Taxi gang falls prey to hilarious fear for homeless Elaine’s romantic well-being when chivalrous Bobby allows her to live in his apartment while he is gone. Unexpectedly, he returns before she has found other quarters

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious sparks fly when Tony tries to fix up his divorced sister with Alex. Instead, she ends up falling for Reverend Jim and Tony goes outrageously overboard trying to break up the affair.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s vicious letter to a hated critic is salvaged from the wastebasket and sent to the newspaper by a gleeful Louie, setting the stage for a wild and comical night when the critic, and the cabbies, decide to take in Bobby’s one-man play.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Latka Gravas is rejected by a young beauty, he sets out on an uproarious crash course to learn to be a swinging American Bachelor, a turnabout that works fantastically with the girls but turns off all of his friends at the garage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jim turns into a soothsayer when he warns of a bizarre catastrophe to befall Alex that also involves an affair with a beautiful blonde.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang hits the bricks in a hilarious hunt for new jobs when the Sunshine Cab. Co. goes out of business, with the promise that they will meet at Mario’s in one month to review their experiences.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies discover that life on the outside is not so rosy when the Sunshine Cab Co. shuts down. They all end up hilariously assuming new careers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie turns into a jealous romantic when his overtures to accompany Elaine on her European vacation are rejected. Instead, Alex becomes the pretty cabbie's holiday companion on a tour of Europe's hot spots—culminating in a romantic rendezvous.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Riotous confusion prevails when Latka Gravas' split personalities prompt Elaine and Alex to take him to a psychiatrist's office, where the predicament takes on a wild new twist as Latka takes on Alex's personality.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Cabbie Jim Ignatowski's legendary psychic powers hilariously thrust him into the hectic world of television programming when he predicts that a TV show will be a hit.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie, at Zena's behest, comforts a girl with boyfriend woes, which leads to zany romantic tangles. Zena's rejected friend uses Louie's narrow shoulders to cry on, unleashing an unexpected comedy adventure that grants him some macho bragging rights.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie the dispatcher is gleeful, but Alex is aghast when the romantic affair between Alex and the new waitress at Mario's is complicated by another suitor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Louie's mother announces her plans to remarry, the panicked dispatcher threatens to sever all ties with her unless she cancels the marriage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A jubilant Tony returns to boxing as the manager of a young heavyweight, thrilling Louie, who anticipates recouping his wagering losses to Alex by betting against Banta's boxer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie carries his actions and insults too far, prompting Elaine to enlist help from a women's organization. Soon, the dispatcher's lecherous laughter is transformed into comical pleading when he is booted out of his job.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Joy blossoms at the Sunshine Cab Co. when a triumphant Bobby Wheeler returns to proclaim that he's landed a TV series role. Louie, in his own charming way, puts a damper on the celebration.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The pretty new cabbie proves to be more than Alex can handle when she leaves the meter running, in an attempt to lure him into romance.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A young runaway wreaks havoc at the Sunshine Cab Co. when Alex and Elaine encourage the lad to return home. Jim wants to adopt him, and Louie wants the youngster jailed for not paying his fare.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Romance and merriment are on the menu for Tony and Alex when they double-date gorgeous twin models at a posh restaurant, only to have the intimate group grow to a crowd with the unwelcome additions of Jim and Alex's ex-wife.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine blows a bundle on the Big Apple's hottest hair stylist for the social bash of the year.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Tony begins working with a new cabbie, Lucius, a former football player. Lucius inspires Tony to try to get his boxing license reinstated.

programme.title: Pixel.TV
programme.desc: Pixel.tv er en nettbasert TV-kanal med fokus på spill og gamere. Her finner du anmeldelser av alle de nyeste spillene på alle plattformer, i tillegg til nyheter om spillindustrien og fankulturen.

programme.title: 2023 Sony Open in Hawaii - Final Round
programme.desc: The final round of the 2023 Sony Open in Hawaii, where Si Woo Kim carded a 6-under 64 to win his fourth PGA TOUR title by one at Waialae Country Club.

programme.title: 2022 Sony Open in Hawaii - Final Round
programme.desc: The final round of the 2022 Sony Open in Hawaii, where Hideki Matsuyama erased a five-stroke deficit, carding a 7-under 63, before defeating Russell Henley in a one-hole playoff for his eighth victory of his PGA TOUR career.

programme.title: 2025 Sony Open in Hawaii - Final Round
programme.desc: Watch the final round of the 2025 Sony Open in Hawaii, from the Waialae Country Club.

programme.title: 2024 Sony Open in Hawaii - Final Round
programme.desc: The final round of the 2024 Sony Open in Hawaii, where Grayson Murray shot a 3-under 67 to force a playoff with Keegan Bradley and Byeong Hun An at 17-under after 72 holes. On the first playoff hole, Murray jarred a 39-foot birdie putt to win.

programme.title: 2023 Sony Open in Hawaii - Final Round
programme.desc: The final round of the 2023 Sony Open in Hawaii, where Si Woo Kim carded a 6-under 64 to win his fourth PGA TOUR title by one at Waialae Country Club.

programme.title: 2022 Sony Open in Hawaii - Final Round
programme.desc: The final round of the 2022 Sony Open in Hawaii, where Hideki Matsuyama erased a five-stroke deficit, carding a 7-under 63, before defeating Russell Henley in a one-hole playoff for his eighth victory of his PGA TOUR career.

programme.title: South Park: En svært elendig jul
programme.desc: Kyle og Ike venter i spenning på Mr. Hankey. Når han ikke kommer, innkaller Kyle de andre til krisemøte.

programme.title: South Park: Rød slede nedskutt
programme.desc: Med julenissens, herr Hankeys og Jesus sin hjelp, forsøker Cartman å bringe julen til Iraks underkuete befolkning.

programme.title: South Park: Det er jul i Kanada
programme.desc: Kyles adoptivbror Ike blir hentet av sine biologiske foreldre fordi den kanadiske statsministeren har bestemt at alle bortadopterte kanadiske barn må returnere til landet.

programme.title: South Park: Skogsdyrenes jul
programme.desc: Julenissen må drepe alle onde dyr i South Park og redde verden etter at Stan narres til å hjelpe dem med fødselen til frelseren deres.

programme.title: South Park: South Parks fantastiske påskespesial
programme.desc: Stan vil finne opprinnelsen til malte påskeegg og oppdager en hemmelighet om den katolske kirken.

programme.title: South Park: Thanksgiving på History Channel
programme.desc: Når gutta prøver å lære seg alt om Thanksgiving fra historiekanalen på TV, blir de fanget i et mysterium som involverer utenomjordiske, Natalie Portman og kalkunfyll!

programme.title: South Park: Black Friday
programme.desc: Gutta forbereder seg på å slåss mot andre kunder på første dag i julehandelen.

programme.title: South Park: Gjennom ræv og ild
programme.desc: 'Svartefredag' nærmer seg og kampen om spillkonsollene blir mer intens - og siden prinsessen Kenny svek Cartman, er han ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Pupper og drager
programme.desc: Dørene til kjøpesenteret skal endelig åpnes for det største 'Svartefredagsalget' i historien. Gutta er uenige om hvilket spillutstyr de skal kjøpe, og et blodig slag vil avgjøre om Xbox eller Sony blir vinneren.

programme.title: South Park: Glade hologram
programme.desc: Cartman trender, mens resten av USA forbereder seg til det største juleprogrammet på tv noensinne.

programme.title: South Park: Bæsjeproblemer
programme.desc: Mr Hankeys støtende oppførsel får ham nesten avskjediget som leder for det årlige julespillet. Samtidig blir South Park grunnskoles Strong Woman og rektor PKs forhold utfordret på helt nye måter.

programme.title: South Park: Sykkelparaden
programme.desc: Guttenes vinnersjanse i sykkelparaden settes på spill når Kenny trekker seg.

programme.title: South Park: Julesnø
programme.desc: Julenissen dreper all glede under julefeiringen i byen.

programme.title: South Park: Starvin' Marvin
programme.desc: I en reklamepause under 'Terrance and Phillip' bestemmer guttene seg for å adoptere et etiopisk barn for å få en gratis klokke.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey, julebæsjen
programme.desc: Borgermesteren vil lage en høytidsfeiring som ikke støter noen, og Kyle tror han har løsningen.

programme.title: South Park: God jul, Charlie Manson!
programme.desc: Onkel Howard rømmer fra fengsel sammen med Charlie Manson, som er klar til å nyte friheten, men blir distrahert av et juleprogram.

programme.title: South Park: Starvin' Marvin i verdensrommet
programme.desc: Marvin er tilbake! Han og guttene reiser verden rundt for å finne mat, med CIA og Sally Struthers hakk i hæl.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankeys juleklassikere
programme.desc: Denne spesialepisoden har numre fra Mr. Hankey's Christmas Collection Album.

programme.title: South Park: Er du der, Gud? Det er meg, Jesus
programme.desc: Alle guttene blir sjalu da Cartman påstår at han har kommet i puberteten. Jesus lover South Parks innbyggere en spektakulær nyttårsfeiring.
programme.sub-title: Er du der, Gud? Det er meg, Jesus

programme.title: South Park: Musikalen 'Hellen Keller!'
programme.desc: Guttene setter opp sin egen versjon av Helen Kellers historie for å overgå barnehagens forestilling.

programme.desc: Kyle og Ike venter i spenning på Mr. Hankey. Når han ikke kommer, innkaller Kyle de andre til krisemøte.

programme.title: The Best of Andy Hamilton: Top Moments & Highlights
programme.desc: Dart døgnet rundt! Her hos oss viser vi direkte ukelige turneringer, seks dager i uken og 50 uker i året. I tillegg sender vi nyheter, ulike reportasjer og intervjuer med de største navnene og personlighetene både forran og bak ochen!

programme.title: On the Oche
programme.desc: Damon Heta joins Jake Kenyon for a chuck and a chat.

programme.title: Oche to Oven: Richie Burnett and Steve Beaton
programme.desc: From the heat of competition to the heat of the kitchen, Beaton and Burnett cook up food and conversation.

programme.title: The Flying Lap Challenge
programme.desc: The Flying Lap Challenge: Fallon Sherrock, Devon Petersen & more race through dartboard checkpoints.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Brian Raman joins Tungsten Talk to reflect on key moments in his career, challenges, and a promising comeback.

programme.title: Darts Biggest Bust-Ups
programme.desc: Matthew Edgar and Henry Deacon discuss the biggest bust-ups in darts and the most dramatic moments.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Danny Jansen reflects on losing his card and balancing darts with fatherhood.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Taylor on Littler
programme.desc: Phil Taylor breaks down Littler's throw, revealing the secrets behind the young World Champion's technique.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Adam Sevada joins Henry Deacon on Tungsten Talk to discuss his journey in darts as an American competitor.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Paul Hinks joins Chris Murphy on Tungsten Talk to delve into memorable moments on the darts circuit.

programme.title: The Vault
programme.desc: Full session replay of Women's Week 1: Finals Night - featuring Fallon Sherrock, Beau Greaves and more!

programme.title: MODUS Moments: Team Ireland
programme.desc: International Pairs Champions Conor Heneghan and John O'Shea reflect on their best moments at the Live Lounge.

programme.title: MODUS Moments: Gemma Hayter & Jarred Cole
programme.desc: Gemma Hayter and Jarred Cole share their top moments, including 9-darters and epic title wins!

programme.title: The Around the World Challenge
programme.desc: Featuring Martin Adams, Trina Gulliver and more!

programme.title: Murph Meets
programme.desc: Chris Murphy meets Bobby George, the King of Bling, at George Hall to uncover the man behind the darts legend.

programme.title: George Noble: The Final Call
programme.desc: Dart døgnet rundt! Her hos oss viser vi direkte ukelige turneringer, seks dager i uken og 50 uker i året. I tillegg sender vi nyheter, ulike reportasjer og intervjuer med de største navnene og personlighetene både forran og bak ochen!

programme.title: The Brass Darts Challenge: With the Rising Stars
programme.desc: Rising stars Ryan Branley, Charlie Manby, and more swap steel for brass to test their skill and adaptability.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Movers and Shakers
programme.desc: Matthew Edgar analyses the quirky oche movements of Wes Newton and Carl Wilson and how they aid their game.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Spotting and Counting
programme.desc: Owen Binks explains spotting and counting, guided by players' complex preferred routes and throwing styles.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Series 1 & 2 Champions
programme.desc: Glen Durrant studies the throws of Series 1 & 2 Champions, Conan Whitehead and Raymond Smith.

programme.title: The Story of John Lowe
programme.desc: Trina Gulliver and Chris Murphy reflect on the legendary career of 3-time World Champion John Lowe.

programme.title: Angry Ginge Vs The Bullseye Challenge
programme.desc: Angry Ginge Vs The Bullseye Challenge - featuring AwayDays, ThisIsFG and more!

programme.title: Paul Hinks: Most Iconic Moments
programme.desc: Refereeing legend Paul Hinks reveals how his career began and relives his most iconic moments.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: 16-time World Champion Phil Taylor shares insights on the next generation's impact on the game's evolution.
programme.sub-title: Phil Taylor on the Future of Youth Darts

programme.title: Break of Throw: Asian Players
programme.desc: Scott Mitchell dissects the throws and key differences of Asian Super Series players incl. Muramatsu & Goto.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Messy Mawmas
programme.desc: Vinny inviterer Angelina hjem... er det en date? Nicole inviterer jentene til California for en forretningsreise/vill helg i vinlandet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Skal!
programme.desc: Pauly og Mike drar til Los Angeles for å støtte Vinny under 'Dancing with the Stars'-premieren. Samtidig sporer en jentehelg i vinlandet av.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Dancing With The Chooch
programme.desc: Vinny danser, Mike fatter noen tvilsomme motevalg, og snart starter familieferien til New Orleans.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: What A Waste Of Cake!
programme.desc: Guido-ene marsjerer inn i New Orleans for en familieferie. Festløvene har med en masse vin.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Operation Mike Drop
programme.desc: Mike fortsetter striden med Angelina om Twitter-krigen deres. Samtidig klekker Pauly og Vinny en plan om å gi Mike alle tiders genusavsløring, 3 km oppe i lufta.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: F.F.D. 2
programme.desc: Deenas jazzkveld med med kostymer er så vidt over da hun planlegger enda mer familemoro med matchende skjorter. Angelina inviterer den nye kjæresten på ferie.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Divorce Party
programme.desc: Angelinas nye mann ankommer akkurat til skilsmissefesten hennes. Snooki brenner bryllupskjolen til Ang. Pauly tar med alle til det mest hjemsøkte huset noensinne.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Birthday Party
programme.desc: 'The Dirty Stay Outs' initierer Angelinas nye mann skikkelig i Jersey Shore. Det er Vinnys fødselsdag og han er klar for den forsinkede festen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Engagement Party
programme.desc: Samboerne blir sjokkerte da Vinnys fødselsdagsfest plutselig blir Angelinas forlovelsesfest. Men det som er enda mer uventet, er hva som skjer da Angelina sier ja.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Hangover
programme.desc: I kjølvannet av Angelinas overraskende forlovelse blir hun uenig med Jenni, og 'megleren' Mike hopper inn. Men det slår feil og turen holder på å ta slutt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Gjenforeningsspesialen, første del.
programme.desc: Kystkompisene gjenforenes for å gå gjennom nok en episk ferie. Justina Valentine er programleder. Gjengen vil unngå dyptgående spørsmål fra fansen og har drikkeleker. Angelinas forlovelse truer med å ødelegge familien.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Gjenforeningsspesialen, andre del
programme.desc: Kystkompisene gjenforenes for å gå gjennom nok en episk ferie. Justina Valentine er programleder. Gjengen vil unngå dyptgående spørsmål fra fansen og har drikkeleker. Angelinas forlovelse truer med å ødelegge familien.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Mothership
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til fjellet, men noe merkelig på himmelen avbryter moroa. Er dette nok en klassisk skøyerstrek, eller er festen endelig over?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Code Word: Lasagna
programme.desc: Etter 11 lange år får samboerne en sjokkerende overraskelse når Sammi 'Sweetheart' kommer tilbake. Kommer hun med gammel bagasje eller en ny start?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Code Word: Lasagna
programme.desc: Etter 11 lange år får samboerne en sjokkerende overraskelse når Sammi 'Sweetheart' kommer tilbake. Kommer hun med gammel bagasje eller en ny start?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Mothership
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til fjellet, men noe merkelig på himmelen avbryter moroa. Er dette nok en klassisk skøyerstrek, eller er festen endelig over?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Sweetest Birthday
programme.desc: Pauly D får smeltet kjøttbollene. Sammis fødselsdag får Vinny til å føle seg litt salt. Da det banker på døren, står alle på tærne.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Meatball Stakeout
programme.desc: En overraskende gjest dukker opp i Poconos. Kjøttbollene og Sammi rigger en plan. Samboerne drar til Atlantic City for å se Pauly snurre plater. Turen får en uventet vri da dna-resultater avsløres.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Charcuterie Party
programme.desc: Guido-ene overtar Atlantic City, og Pauly tar opp kontakten med en gammel venn. Men moroa tar slutt når Snookis småkjøttfest blir dramatisk.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Margarita Problems!
programme.desc: Mike starter en etterforskning rundt omstendighetene om Angelinas biologiske far, og fortsetter å røre i gryta da etterdønningene av kjøttfesten slår til.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: We the People
programme.desc: Mrs. Hinkle, Mary, Lucy, and even Matt and Shana lend a hand to their industrious younger siblings with the paper route.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: The Voice
programme.desc: The custodian at Simon's school tells the Reverend that he's been hearing the voice of God.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: All Dogs Go To Heaven
programme.desc: Matt's trying to look out for his younger sister, but Mary is fighting for her right to party.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: There Goes the Bride (Part 1)
programme.desc: In the first of this two-part episode, Heather is back in town and getting married, but Matt finds out an awful secret about her fiance.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: There Goes the Bride (Part 2)
programme.desc: In the dramatic conclusion of this two-part episode, Heather finds out the ugly truth about her betrothed, while Matt tries to convince Shana that he still loves her.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt finally moves out and Dad visits the hospital via the emergency room.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric's post heart-attack zest for life is making everyone a little crazy.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric counsels a young man who feels his wife should be meek and subservient, while Annie and the girls rally for women's rights in Afghanistan.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt hates his job and tries to decide what to do with his life.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt refuses to help a classmate cheat, and gets in trouble anyway.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Aunt Julie goes into labor while visiting the Camdens, but there's no car or help to be found.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: In the first of this dramatic two-part episode, Mary lets her anger sway her judgement when the basketball coach imposes a lockout.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary faces the possibility of jail time in the conclusion of this dramatic two- part episode.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Just when Matt thought things were great with his girlfriend, she starts to withdraw from him.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt's devastated when he finds out his girlfriend has been accepted to a college 3,000 miles away.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary's mad at Dad for standing in the middle of her blossoming relationship.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Annie takes off for a much-needed rest, but she can't escape the troubles that weigh down her soul.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: When dad spies on his kids, he catches Lucy making out in public - with *N SYNC's Lance Bass!

programme.title: Half a Loaf of Kung Fu NO
programme.desc: Jackie Chan spiller den unge klønete Jiang. Jiang vokste opp uten foreldre og til tross for at han verken har et akademisk hode eller de kampsportferdighetene han gjerne skulle hatt, klarer han å lure seg til steder og berømmelse han bare kunne drømme om.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China and America NO
programme.desc: I en tid da mange kinesere ble solgt til amerikanske jernbaneselskaper som behandlet dem brutalt med tøffe arbeidsforhold, reiser Wong Fei-hung til Amerika. Men etter et bakholdsangrep blir han adskilt fra de andre han reiser med.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze NO
programme.desc: Skilpaddene tror at deres fiende Shredder er død etter at han falt i søppelknuseren i slutten av forrige film. Fotklanen har fått vite om deres gjemmested i kloakken og derfor bor de midlertidig hos journalisten April.

programme.title: The Young Master NO
programme.desc: Etter at Dragon har blitt bedratt av sin egen bror, Tiger, står de to som representanter for rivaliserende skoler i den årlige løvedansekonkurransen. Selv om Tiger vinner, blir han tvunget til eksil av skammen over å ha sveket sine egne.

programme.title: My Lucky Stars NO
programme.desc: Politimannen Muscle fra Hong Kong drar til Japan på jakt etter en korrupt kollega. Men siden yakuzaen allerede har opplysninger om ham, kan han ikke gjøre jobben på egen hånd. Etter hvert kaller de inn barndomsvennene til Muscle for å hjelpe til.

programme.title: Armor of God 2: Operation Condor NO
programme.desc: Eventyreren i Jackie Chans skikkelse er tilbake i en ny jakt etter en bortgjemt skatt, skjult i ørkenen av nazistene før andre verdenskrig. Men Jackie og kompanjongen hans Ada er ikke de eneste som leter etter skatten...

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles NO
programme.desc: Donatello, Rafael, Michelangelo og Leonardo er muterte, grønne ninja-skilpadder som elsker pizza og lever under New Yorks gateplan. Derifra tar de opp kampen mot den ondskapsfulle forbryteren Shredder og hans armé av svartkledde krigere.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze NO
programme.desc: Skilpaddene tror at deres fiende Shredder er død etter at han falt i søppelknuseren i slutten av forrige film. Fotklanen har fått vite om deres gjemmested i kloakken og derfor bor de midlertidig hos journalisten April.

programme.title: Female Prisoner Scorpion: #701's Grudge Song
programme.desc: Matsu er igjen på rømmen, og får hjelp av en strippeklubbarbeider som bærer nag til etterforskeren som prøver å finne henne. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: The Heroic Trio
programme.desc: En tøff kvinne med en usynlig kappe har stjålet 18 babyer for sin mektige herre, prøver to andre tøffe kvinner og politiet å stoppe henne. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John Becker goes on a cruise and Jake dates a supermodel. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is asked to be the keynote speaker at an early graduation for Harding High schools class of 2001.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: After her marriage ends, Megan re-enters Becker's life and he becomes aware of Megan's sordid past. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Linda and Reggie date the same man and Becker unwillingly gets involved. Bob finds out he has a tenant whos a prostitute. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John Becker has insomnia and the gang tries to help him get through it. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John runs into an old college mentor/professor who doesn't remember him. This torments John who tries to get the professor to remember him. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets an unexpected visit from his godson who is reluctant to tell his father he's gay. Reggie gets into a caddy argument with her friend, Sara. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: You Say Gay Son, I Say Godson

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John thinks the new water deliveryman is bad luck. A string of mishaps occur and everyone blames it on the deliveryman. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is being sued for malpractice by a patient. Louis knits Margaret a swest (sweater/vest) and Reggie, Bob and Jake discuss the worst ways to die. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Beckers patient sues him for malpractice and Bob sleeps with his Johns lawyer, Ruth. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker sees a psychologist and Linda looks for a new job.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: During an attempt to quit smoking, John attends a for-kids only pancake breakfast.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Jake gets married to a girl he just met. John buys a faux designer clock as a gift, which gets broken.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John helps a homeless man he discovered is a con artist when he learns the man is ill.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John panics when he has to get an MRI, finally resorting to Valium to get through the claustrophobic test.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John takes Reggies advice to be more sensitive with women. It helps at the office with Margaret, but backfires with a woman he is dating.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is surprised when a patient is disappointed at the news that he's not terminally ill. Jake scams Bob in a Scrabble game.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie goes out to dinner with her abusive friend Sara and Sara's husband, Richard. She finds that she and Richard are attracted to each other.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John tries to keep a casual love affair alive, while Bob tries to turn a found Super Bowl ring into his ticket to fame and fortune.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John believes that Christmas is a phony time of the year. Instead of embracing the Christmas spirit, he uses getting robbed as vindication for his position.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker and the crew decide to barter services office visits for food and services.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker obsesses over whether or not younger women still find him attractive. Linda takes advantage of a hard-working temp.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets in hot water with parents when his nutrition lecture at an elementary school turns into a sex talk.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John gets a portable talking computer for his speech-impaired patient, with unintended consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker bores a bartender with a story about his ex-wife's wedding.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie decides to help Jake fulfill some of the dreams he had as a child, with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker's laundry, apartment, and mail have all been tampered with and he is sure the culprit is one of his pesky neighbors.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Bob uses a questionable friend to get Reggie a great deal on a new freezer. John acts as a sex therapist for the Bennetts, an 80-year-old couple having difficulties because of Mr. Bennett's newly revived libido.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: An unflattering picture of someone other than John is placed in an article about him, causing him distress.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: When John receives some expensive steaks from a patient, his new neighbor Chris cajoles him into throwing a party.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is surprisingly concerned when he learns that his new neighbor Chris has left town without saying goodbye.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie and Chris compete for John's affection. Linda takes Margaret out for a night on the town.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Now that Reggie is gone, John tells Chris he has feelings for her (Chris).

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John sits on his fire escape, smoking a cigar, the smoke from which is wafting into Chris's open window directly above.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: As John and Jake chat about Chris at the diner, Bob rushes in and announces that he just saw Chris naked when he went to fix her faucet.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has a videotape of a French film that he plans to use to lure Chris into coming over to his place.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker tries to discourage a friend from expressing interest in Chris by telling him that she is gay.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's failed attacks in the Mediterranean region draw in the Germans.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: End Game
programme.desc: In January 1945, Nazi Germany faces defeat as Allied armies close in. Hitler, aged 55 and in poor health, remains defiant in his Berlin bunker. On April 30th, 1945, Hitler commits suicide, and days later, Germany surrenders, ending World War II.

programme.title: Secret War: Agent Garbo
programme.desc: Juan Pujol, MI6's WWII agent "Garbo," created a fictitious spy network in Lisbon, deceiving the Germans with crucial disinformation and influencing their strategies. After the war, MI6 protected him, and he lived in Venezuela until his death in 1988.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Barbarossa Unleashed 1941
programme.desc: E1 begins with a brief examination of the rationale of hatred projected by Hitler onto the Soviet-Slavic-Jewish world. Then it leaps forward, to see Hitler initiate an invasion of the USSR.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The AK-47, the world's deadliest firearm, sparked a Cold War race for superior assault rifles like the American M4 and German HK 416. Host Wil Willis explores its history, from Mikhail Kalashnikov's WWII experiences to its assembly and lethal impact.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Former U.S. Army Ranger Wil Willis tests modern combat shotguns like the Benelli M4 and Mossberg 590, alongside historic models.This documentary features 3D animations and weapon tests to explore effectiveness of combat shotguns.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Grand Mufti
programme.desc: The controversy surrounding Mohammad Amin al-Husayni, stems from his Nazi collaboration. He recruited Bosnian Muslims and advocated for a Palestinian homeland with Nazi help. His diaries reveal awareness of the Holocaust and anti-Semitic sentiments.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: The Final Solution
programme.desc: This is the story of how Hitler orchestrated the genocide of 6 million Jews. Hitler portrayed Jews as a societal threat, using Goebbels' propaganda. Deportations were masked as resettlements while Auschwitz-Birkenau became a death factory.

programme.title: Mata Hari - The Beautiful Spy
programme.desc: Mata Hari. Dance, Seduction and Espionage. The enduring myth.

programme.title: Secret War: Hardy Amies and Operation Ratweek
programme.desc: Operation Ratweek’s existence has always been denied. However WMR has now discovered evidence that it existed and was carried out.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Slovenia: The Crow's Flight
programme.desc: Monty heads to Slovenia to retrace one of the most daring, yet unknown, mass escapes of Allied prisoners during the second world war, made possible only with the help of partisans and locals.

programme.title: Secret War: Double Agent Tricycle
programme.desc: Dusan Popov was almost certainly James Bond. Ian Fleming knew all the stories about him. Popov managed to persuade both the Germans and MI6 to keep him in the style of a millionaire businessman while performing a series of missions against the Nazis.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Time is Blood 1942-5
programme.desc: Episode 2 begins after the desperate German winter of 1941. Yet 1942 began badly for the Soviets, with more vicious Nazi campaigning seeing millions more Russians captured and starved.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: They are iconic weapons: the Tommy Gun, Uzi, and today’s MP5. Invented to break WWI stalemates, the submachine gun revolutionized warfare and culture. Host Wil Willis explores its evolution, firing the Thompson and BAR.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Liberation & Revenge
programme.desc: 1945 frigjør soldater fra den Røde Hæren Auschwitz-Birkenau. Når andre befrielsene finner sted i de påfølgende månedene, blir verden sjokkert.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Aftermath
programme.desc: In WWII's final months, Allies discover Nazi death camps, prompting a sweeping denazification of Germany post-war. Nuremberg trials convict top Nazis. Former Nazis are employed by the West in the Cold War struggle against the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Today’s infantry demands a weapon combining machine gun firepower with rifle accuracy and mobility.. Host Wil Willis traces this journey through iconic firearms.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The remaining models undergo a heavy metallic make-up photo shoot with John Swanell. Lisa arrives at the house and the girls have to critique each other, which causes even more fights. A practical joke gets taken the wrong way.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls shoot a thirty second jewellery promotion with top promo director Jason Clifford. Lucy, last years winner, visits the girls and gives them some tips. They have a country life photo shoot and there is a shock at elimination.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: With two people gone the house becomes even more divided. The girls meet Saffron Aldridge, top style expert, who goes through their wardrobes with no mercy. They have a one on one with Lisa and the girls are awe-struck when they meet a famous model.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The four remaining models head to Morocco and Lisa gives them the day off. They are given the challenge of finding an outfit for Lisa. They have their first Moroccan photo shoot and the final three are chosen.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In the finale the three remaining models have their final photo shoot and the final two compete in a catwalk show and one girl is crowned 'Britain's Next Top Model'.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls immediately face their first challenge, posing in front of the press. They then meet stylist Hilary Alexander, who asks them when they lost their virginity and what they think about unprotected sex.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls take part in a catwalk challenge set by Otis Isles, the internationally respected casting director, model agent, and fashion producer, who tells them to dress in underwear.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls arrive at the English National Ballet School, where Lisa introduces them to ballet teacher Louise Halliday. They learn about the art of ballet to help with their movement.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls order a pizza and find Lisa Mail for the challenge the following morning. A huge fight breaks out between Stefanie and Louise.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls are taken to Debenhams, where they get the chance to meet Caprice. They are given fifteen minutes to find an outfit for different occasions.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls arrive at a bar where they meet music video director Paul Hills. Their challenge is to star in a music video along with The Wolfmen.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls are woken up by a grueling morning workout from Celebrity Personal Trainer Nicki Waterman. Some struggle with the workout, especially Sherece.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls arrive at Models 1, where they meet Mark Evans along with casting agents. They take a Polaroid shot for a casting. Mark announces that they will be going to Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, but there are only four places on the plane.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls arrive in Rio and excitedly explore the luxurious villa they will be staying in. On a rare day off, they are driven to Ipanema to play beach volleyball with local guys, and in the evening, they are joined for dinner by Lisa.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The top three girls take a cable car to Sugar Loaf Mountain to learn Samba dancing.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Aptitude and Natural Talent
programme.desc: All 14 girls are interviewed by the press where they are asked why they want to win. The models pair up and pick each partners best and worst features. The girls receive news about their first photoshoot and later find out it's a topless shoot in pairs.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Poise and Composure
programme.desc: The girls get a crash course in dance with top choreographer Supple and a runway lesson from top fashionista Jeanette. The winners get to take part in a fashion show featuring the work of top designer Scottee - whose dresses are all made out of paper.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam is determined to figure out what Andi's hiding when he discovers she's been keeping secrets from him for his own good.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam is thrilled and honored to help Joe buy a new car but is caught off guard when Joe suddenly becomes irritable, and the negotiations go off track.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Don realize they need to bring in more business, they film a commercial advertising their company.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi set up Adam's boss on a date to boost her spirits in the hope that she'll then be in the mood to have Adam resume work on the mini-mall.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Andi proposes an exciting idea for Adam and her to go into business together when she isn't able to find work. Also, Adam tackles the most challenging job of his life - renovating Joe and Bev's (Swoosie Kurtz) kitchen.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam attempts to make the office feel more inviting since Andi will be joining him at work every day; Lowell hides a life-changing secret.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi have a disagreement at the office and must prevent it from becoming a problem at home; the kids try to extend Lowell's stay at their house after realizing he's an amazing cook.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam sees a kid push Emme, he convinces Teddy to defend his younger sister; Adam and Don persuade Joe to hire a nurse to help him after he has his upcoming knee surgery.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and the guys visit Lowell at his new bachelor pad and start using it to get away from their home lives; Andi keeps pushing Adam for her own desk at the office.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam catches Kate sneaking back into the house at night, he is determined to fix the behavior with old-school parenting tactics; Andi is dismayed when she can't find many baby pictures of Emme.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi go to great lengths to secure a loan to fix an unexpected issue on their flip house.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi are eager to book a night away in a hotel after Teddy keeps sleeping in their bed; Kate is allowed to stay home alone but doesn't follow Adam and Andi's strict rules.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam offers to go on a vegan diet with Kate in an effort to bond with her, his love of meat proves a hard habit to break.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: After Adam throws out his back on his 50th birthday, he is still determined to take a dirt bike excursion and check it off his bucket list; Don and Adam give out bonuses at work.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam gets jealous when Teddy names Andi as his hero for a school essay.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam accidentally invites Andi to go on the guys' annual trip, he tries to un-invite her, which only makes matters worse.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam recruits Marcy to put Andi's snooty sister in her place when she comes for a visit.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi see how much Lowell's new relationship with Andi's sister is changing him, they stage an intervention to get him to stop putting up with her bad behavior.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi's doctor advises her to stop taking birth control pills, Adam and Andi disagree on an alternate option.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Dave has a cold that has him acting like a baby, and Debbie's treating him like one; Rebecca and Joanna, however, think he's overreacting and are concerned he's going to ruin their spa weekend away

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Don become super protective of Lowell when they think he might get back together with his cheating ex-wife; Joe experiences an unexpected side effect from his new pacemaker.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi offer Teddy dating advice but wind up making things super awkward for him instead.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam encourages Don to give himself food poisoning to get out of babysitting his destructive grandson; Adam and Andi argue over who has to take Kate and her teenage friends dress shopping.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam buys a boat without asking Andi, they wind up in couples therapy to settle the disagreement.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam discovers someone is sneaking his boat out at night, and he assumes the culprits are Don and Joe; after Andi makes Kate get a job at the mall, Kate decides she no longer wants to go to college.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Don disagree about a new house to flip for their construction business, their bickering reveals bigger issues in their relationship; Andi goes to great lengths to throw the perfect birthday party for Bev.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam's mother-in-law Alice makes an unexpected visit and reveals some shocking news.
programme.sub-title: Stuck In The Middle With You

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi resort to their usual punishment in response to Teddy's bad grades, his unexpected reaction catches them off guard.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi attempt to spice up their social life by making new friends.
programme.sub-title: Adam and Andi See Other People

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam has trouble helping Katie prepare for her driving test; Don turns to Lowell for help romancing Marcy.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam tries to give Andi the perfect 20th wedding anniversary gift by re-creating their honeymoon.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Toshiro Kandagawa is not happy with the results from the Ohta faction challengers so far. Two have tried to defeat Morimoto and both have failed.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The Royal Park Hotel's grand chef Mitsuo Shimamura's last two proteges defeated the Iron Chefs. Iio is Shimamura's right-hand man and his strongest yet to enter Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: See who slips in the battle of banana, Iron Chef Kobe or Hironobu Tsujiguchi.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chen se enfrenta a Ryozo Asao, el heredero de una dinastía de restaurantes franceses, con esturión, un tipo de pescado conocido por su caviar.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chen takes on Ryozo Asao, the heir to a French restaurant dynasty, with sturgeon, a kind of fish known for its caviar.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Today's challenger is endorsed by Tenmei Kanoh, a photographer and frequent Iron Chef judge. This French-trained chef takes the route of using local ingredients in his dishes.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Newcomer Seiya Masahara takes on Iron Chef Morimoto over anglerfish, a deep-sea delicacy .

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Specializing in Chinese imperial cuisine, Tsui Yu Fun challenges Iron Chef Chen's Szechuan-style cooking in the battle of Chinese cabbage.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: While Japanese cuisine tends to be tradition-bound, this challenger refuses to be bound by old rules. He respects the basics, but is always looking for new ways to expand.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Kobe is challenged by Franco Canzoniere. Who's cuisine will reign supreme?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Morimoto takes on the tough Yusuke Yamashita, the newest offering from Ohta's conservative Japanese cooking consortium.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The tiebreaker between Iron Chef Morimoto and Yamashita.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Can Chen continue his winning streak against the Kihachi Group's latest challenger, Takeshi Okubo?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Sakai takes on Michel Husser in the battle of lamb.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Spano Stelvio chooses Chen for this battle of suckling pig.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: What can the Prince of Pasta do with giant lobster in this battle against Makoto Osada?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: This non-traditional battle of sushi between Morimoto and Keiji Nakazawa is sure to please.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The rare black pork is brought out as the equalizer between Sakai and Isao Makio.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Morimoto takes on Michael Noble in the battle of potato.

programme.title: Ernest's Greatest Hits Volume 2
programme.desc: Hey, Vern! Your ol' buddy Ernest (Jim Varney) is back in a video that features commercials, bloopers, behind-the-scenes looks and special surprises!

programme.title: Ernest Rides Again
programme.desc: Den tullete Ernest P. Worrell og hans dumdristige kompis Abner graver opp en kanon som sies å innholde Englands kronjuveler. NB Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Ernest in the Army
programme.desc: Ernest melder seg inn i hæren for å kunne kjøre store maskiner, men ender opp med å bli sendt ut i kamp! NB Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Ernest Goes to School
programme.desc: Jim Varneys helsprø karakter Ernest P. Worrell er tilbake i denne filmen som en vaktmester på en skole som prøver å få seg et videregående diplom. NB Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Ernest's Greatest Hits Volume 1
programme.desc: Before Ernest P. Worrell had his own film series, he hosted a variety of commercials and made public service announcements. This film features many of his greatest moments and bloopers.
